candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related amortization row, but it appears as a component beneath the already selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold', so adding it separately would risk double counting.
Explicit COGS-related depreciation row, but it is presented as a subcomponent within the already selected 'Cost of goods sold' bucket rather than a separate same-level operating line to add on top.
Looks like a balancing/helper line tied to COGS depreciation, not an additional standalone operating D&A row to add separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the parent line 'Cost of goods sold'. The visible COGS D&A rows are nested subcomponents of that parent, so they appear already embedded in the selected bucket. Conservative no-double-counting treatment is to add nothing separately.

candidates.why: Sales/distribution depreciation is shown as a component under the already selected parent row 'Sales and distribution expenses', so it should not be added separately.
Sales/distribution amortization appears to be part of the selected 'Sales and distribution expenses' bucket, not a separate same-level line outside it.
Administrative depreciation is presented as a subcomponent of the already selected 'Administrative expenses' row, implying inclusion in that bucket.
Administrative amortization appears nested within the selected 'Administrative expenses' bucket, so separate addition would double count.

R&D depreciation is a component under the selected 'Research and development expenses' row. Since R&D is also separately selected in XRD, adding R&D D&A separately would be unnecessary and could distort the intended XSGA-XRD treatment.

R&D amortization is shown as part of the selected 'Research and development expenses' bucket, and the same R&D parent row is already used for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so it should not be added separately.
This appears to be a balancing/helper line related to R&D amortization rather than a separate operating D&A line to add.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket already includes 'Sales and distribution expenses', 'Research and development expenses', and 'Administrative expenses'. The visible D&A rows are subcomponents under those parent rows, not separate same-level operating expenses. In addition, R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so R&D-related D&A should not be added separately.
